headline: Vanguard VT vs State Street SPDW Global ETF Showdown. Which World-Spanning Fund Is the Better Buy?
summary: VT covers some 10,000 stocks worldwide, while SPDW focuses on developed markets ex-US with around 2,000 holdings but a higher yield.
